successCriteria.description: src/modules/policy/policy.service.ts exists and exports IPolicyService and PolicyService
src/modules/policy/policy.routes.ts exists and exports policyRoutes plugin
All CRUD endpoints (GET /policies/:id, GET /policies, POST /policies, PUT /policies/:id) are registered with RBAC middleware and Zod validation
validateEntitlement correctly checks policy existence, active status, and requestedDays <= remainingBalance
All state-changing operations (create, update, delete) execute within a single database transaction that includes the policy mutation and the corresponding audit record insertion (GP-002)
Jest unit tests exist in tests/unit/modules/policy/ covering PolicyService, PolicyController, and route registration

constraints: Repository pattern: all database access goes through repository interfaces (ILeavePolicyRepository)
Audit records: all state-changing operations write an audit record via IAuditService
Input validation: validate all inputs at API boundaries using Zod schemas
No sensitive data in logs: never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
RBAC enforcement: all API endpoints enforce role-based access control via rbacMiddleware
Error handling: no unhandled promise rejections; all async errors mapped to HTTP responses (GP-006)
outOfScope: Any other modules not explicitly part of the policy module service/controller/routes
